marketplaces.name: OpenAI GPT Store
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Pool-based revenue share from ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription revenue; actual payout varies by usage and geography.
marketplaces.best_for: Consumer utility agents and productivity GPTs

marketplaces.name: Anthropic Claude Marketplace
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Anthropic does not take a commission; partners keep 100% of revenue and bill customers directly.

marketplaces.name: Quora Poe Creator Economy
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Poe pays creators based on subscriber engagement with their bots; exact rate not public.
marketplaces.best_for: Prompt bots and server bots with loyal users

marketplaces.name: Salesforce Agentforce Exchange
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Agents are sold via Salesforce AppExchange; partners pay AppExchange listing fee and Salesforce takes a percentage of paid listings.

marketplaces.name: Pickaxe Marketplace
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Pickaxe charges creators based on plan and usage; marketplace revenue is split between creator and platform.

marketplaces.name: Zapier Central / Interfaces
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Zapier does not operate a direct agent marketplace; monetization is via Zapier plans and partner integrations.
marketplaces.best_for: Workflow agents that integrate with existing SaaS stacks

marketplaces.name: Relevance AI Agent Marketplace
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Relevance AI lets partners build and sell agents; platform fees are bundled into customer subscriptions.

marketplaces.name: GitHub Marketplace (Copilot extensions)
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: GitHub takes a percentage of paid extension sales; free extensions are common.

marketplaces.name: AWS Marketplace for Gen AI
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: AWS Marketplace charges sellers based on product type; private offers and SaaS listings have standard AWS Marketplace fees.
marketplaces.best_for: Enterprise AI agents deployed on AWS

marketplaces.name: Stripe Apps / Stripe Partner Ecosystem
marketplaces.revenue_share_note: Stripe takes a portion of paid app revenue through the Stripe App Marketplace.
marketplaces.best_for: Agents that handle payments, billing, or finance workflows

pricing_models.name: Free + platform revenue share
pricing_models.note: List for free; platform pays a share of pooled subscription revenue.

pricing_models.name: Subscription
pricing_models.note: Charge a recurring monthly/annual fee directly or through the platform.

pricing_models.name: Per-action / usage
pricing_models.note: Charge per task, message, or token consumed.

pricing_models.name: Per-resolution
pricing_models.note: Charge only when the agent completes a task successfully.

pricing_models.name: Setup + retainer
pricing_models.note: One-time implementation fee plus monthly managed-service retainer.

pricing_models.name: White-label / OEM
pricing_models.note: Build once, resell under each client's brand with setup fees.
